Video.summary: By conquering Greece, Philip II of Macedon set the stage for the rise of his son, Alexander the Great.
Video.grandparentTitle: Alexander the Great and the Hellenistic Age
Video.title: Greeks and Macedonians

Video.summary: Alexander's path was prepared by Philip, but few could predict how the son would eclipse the father.
Video.grandparentTitle: Alexander the Great and the Hellenistic Age
Video.title: Alexander the Divine?

Video.summary: Did his Egyptian sojourn teach Alexander the political value of blurring the lines between human and divine?
Video.grandparentTitle: Alexander the Great and the Hellenistic Age
Video.title: The Blazing Star

Video.summary: Can we discern the historical Alexander, or has the myth swallowed the man?
Video.grandparentTitle: Alexander the Great and the Hellenistic Age
Video.title: Alexander—Myth and Reality

Video.summary: Survey the issues you'll consider and the scholars whose theories serve as gateways to exploration.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Fall of the Pagans and the Origins of Medieval Christianity
Video.title: Religious Conflict in the Roman World

Image.alt: Religious Conflict in the Roman World
Religious Conflict in the Roman World
Religious Conflict in the Roman World

Video.summary: Grasp the diverse assortment of religious practices in an empire that ranged from Britain to Egypt.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Fall of the Pagans and the Origins of Medieval Christianity
Video.title: Gods and Their Cities in the Roman Empire

Image.alt: Gods and Their Cities in the Roman Empire
Gods and Their Cities in the Roman Empire
Gods and Their Cities in the Roman Empire

Video.summary: Learn how Rome's first emperor, Augustus, established an institution to venerate an emperor's spirit.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Fall of the Pagans and the Origins of Medieval Christianity
Video.title: The Roman Imperial Cult

Video.summary: Examine cults and the question of whether they formed a bridge between paganism and Christianity.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Fall of the Pagans and the Origins of Medieval Christianity
Video.title: The Mystery Cults

Video.summary: Where is the West? Who is Western? If civilization means cities, where do those come from?
Video.grandparentTitle: The Foundations of Western Civilization
Video.title: "Western," "Civilization," and "Foundations"

Video.summary: Look at why a slice of what is now southern Iraq became a foundation of Western civilization.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Foundations of Western Civilization
Video.title: History Begins at Sumer

Video.summary: The differences between Egypt and Mesopotamia tell us as much as the similarities.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Foundations of Western Civilization
Video.title: Egypt - The Gift of the Nile

Image.alt: Egypt - The Gift of the Nile
Egypt - The Gift of the Nile
Egypt - The Gift of the Nile

Video.summary: Israel, built by the descendants of Abraham, bequeathed to the West crucial religious ideas.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Foundations of Western Civilization
Video.title: The Hebrews - Small States and Big Ideas

Image.alt: The Hebrews - Small States and Big Ideas
The Hebrews - Small States and Big Ideas
The Hebrews - Small States and Big Ideas

Video.summary: Where does the idea of the "Middle" Ages come from?
Video.grandparentTitle: The High Middle Ages
Video.title: Why the Middle Ages?

Video.summary: In the Middle Ages, small innovations and events had huge effects.
Video.grandparentTitle: The High Middle Ages
Video.title: Demography and the Commercial Revolution

Video.summary: A group of warriors came to form a hereditary aristocracy with unique legal privileges.
Video.grandparentTitle: The High Middle Ages
Video.title: Those Who Fought - The Nobles

Video.summary: How far did works of chivalric romance go to change actual behavior?
Video.grandparentTitle: The High Middle Ages
Video.title: The Chivalric Code

Video.summary: Discover how the Great Epidemic of 1617 changed North America.
Video.grandparentTitle: Turning Points in American History
Video.title: 1617 The Great Epidemic

Video.summary: Why did a democratic America become a slaveholding society?
Video.grandparentTitle: Turning Points in American History
Video.title: 1619 Land of the Free? Slavery Begins

Image.alt: 1619 Land of the Free? Slavery Begins
1619 Land of the Free? Slavery Begins

Video.summary: Consider Roger Williams\'s efforts to establish freedom of religion.
Video.grandparentTitle: Turning Points in American History
Video.title: 1636 Freedom of Worship - Roger Williams

Video.summary: A symbol of the idea that all are welcome in America took place in 1654.
Video.grandparentTitle: Turning Points in American History
Video.title: 1654 Yearning to Breathe Free - Immigration

Video.summary: Abraham Lincoln was born with little more than his own natural talents.
Video.grandparentTitle: Mr. Lincoln: The Life of Abraham Lincoln
Video.title: Young Man Lincoln

Video.summary: Lincoln\'s entry into politics coincided with the emergence of the Whigs.
Video.grandparentTitle: Mr. Lincoln: The Life of Abraham Lincoln
Video.title: Whig Meteor

Video.summary: Lincoln won election to Congress in 1846, but his term was undistinguished.
Video.grandparentTitle: Mr. Lincoln: The Life of Abraham Lincoln
Video.title: Lincoln, Law, and Politics

Video.summary: Lincoln\'s folksiness was a shield he rarely let down.
Video.grandparentTitle: Mr. Lincoln: The Life of Abraham Lincoln
Video.title: The Mind of Abraham Lincoln

Video.summary: Learn how history's greatest colonial empire came about.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Rise and Fall of the British Empire
